description: SDK for interacting with Alias smart contracts on the HARA blockchain, providing factory and storage abstractions.

aliasfactory.purpose: Provides factory methods to instantiate and interact with Alias contracts.

exported_types.name: AliasFactory
exported_types.purpose: A wrapper around the Alias factory contract for building and sending transactions.

methods.name: GetRegistrationPeriod
methods.description: Returns the duration of a registration period code.

methods.name: Namehash
methods.description: Computes the ENS-style namehash for a given domain name.

methods.name: Resolve
methods.description: Resolves a node hash to its registered DID.

methods.name: ResolveFromString
methods.description: Resolves a domain name string to its registered DID.

methods.name: GetAliasStatus
methods.description: Returns expiration, revocation, and validity status for a node.

methods.name: GetAliasStatusFromString
methods.description: Returns status for a domain name string.

methods.name: GetOwner
methods.description: Returns the hex address of the owner for a node.

methods.name: GetOwnerFromString
methods.description: Returns the owner address for a domain name string.

methods.name: GetDID
methods.description: Retrieves the DID associated with a node.

methods.name: GetDIDFromString
methods.description: Retrieves the DID for a domain name string.

methods.name: GetTLDOwner
methods.description: Returns the owner of a Top-Level Domain.

methods.name: GetAddress
methods.description: Returns the contract address of the factory.

methods.name: GetBlockchain
methods.description: Returns the associated blockchain instance.

methods.name: SetDIDRootStorage
methods.description: Updates the DID root storage contract address.

methods.name: SetDIDOrgStorage
methods.description: Updates the DID organization storage contract address.

methods.name: RegisterTLD
methods.description: Registers a new Top-Level Domain.

methods.name: RegisterDomain
methods.description: Registers a new second-level domain.

methods.name: SetDID
methods.description: Sets the DID for a specific domain.

methods.name: SetDIDOrg
methods.description: Sets the Organization and User DIDs for a domain.

methods.name: ExtendRegistration
methods.description: Extends the registration period of a domain.

methods.name: RevokeAlias
methods.description: Revokes an existing alias.

methods.name: UnrevokeAlias
methods.description: Restores a previously revoked alias.

methods.name: RegisterSubdomain
methods.description: Registers a new subdomain under a parent domain.

methods.name: TransferAliasOwnership
methods.description: Transfers ownership of a domain alias.

methods.name: TransferTLD
methods.description: Transfers ownership of a Top-Level Domain.

exported_types.name: AliasStatus
exported_types.purpose: Represents the current state of a domain alias.

methods.name: ToArgs
methods.description: Packs parameters for contract call.

utility_functions.name: NewAliasFactory
utility_functions.description: Instantiates AliasFactory with given contract details.

aliasstorage.purpose: Provides abstractions for interacting with Alias storage contracts.

exported_types.name: AliasStorage
exported_types.purpose: A wrapper around the Alias storage contract.

methods.name: GetNodeOwner
methods.description: Returns the owner address for a given node.

methods.name: GetTLDOwner
methods.description: Returns the owner address for a TLD node.

methods.name: GetNodeDID
methods.description: Returns the DID associated with a specific node.

methods.name: GetAliasData
methods.description: Retrieves comprehensive data for an alias.

methods.name: IsAliasValid
methods.description: Checks if an alias is currently valid.

methods.name: GetDIDRootStorage
methods.description: Returns the root storage contract address.

methods.name: GetDIDOrgStorage
methods.description: Returns the organization storage contract address.

methods.name: GetAddress
methods.description: Returns the contract address of the storage unit.

methods.name: GetBlockchain
methods.description: Returns the associated blockchain instance.

methods.name: SetFactoryContract
methods.description: Updates the factory contract reference in storage.

methods.name: ToArgs
methods.description: Packs parameters for contract call.

utility_functions.name: NewAliasStorage
utility_functions.description: Instantiates AliasStorage with given contract details.

utils.purpose: General purpose utilities and shared interfaces.

exported_types.name: TxParams
exported_types.purpose: Common interface for transaction parameters across the SDK.

methods.name: ToArgs
methods.description: Returns arguments for the transaction.
